Name: Eric Cruz
Summary: Dedicated QA Engineer with 8+ years of experience in technology solutions and software development. Proven track record of delivering high-quality results.
Skills: API Testing, JUnit, Git, JIRA, Selenium, Automation Testing, Postman, Java, TestNG, Microservices, Python, Manual Testing
Experience: Principal QA Engineer at Tesla (2022 - 2024): Mentored 4 junior developers and conducted code reviews; Developed and maintained 10 production applications serving 478K+ users. QA Engineer at IBM (2016 - 2020): Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver 4 major features; Improved system performance by 22% through optimization techniques. Lead QA Engineer at Apple (2008 - 2010): Mentored 4 junior developers and conducted code reviews; Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 42%.
Education: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from UCLA, 2015, GPA: 3.41
